title: Coverage → payer_plan_period (core)
notes: Synthea emits no Coverage, so this branch is exercised only by synthetic cases. The standalone Coverage edge is a **source-value-only** mapping today: `payer_concept_id` / `plan_concept_id` / `sponsor_concept_id` / `stop_reason_concept_id` are hardcoded `0` (no per-source ConceptMap), the payer/plan names land in `*_source_value`, and the period bounds (`COALESCE(start,end)..COALESCE(end,start)`) become the plan-period dates. A Coverage with no `period` is dropped (`WHERE period_start IS NOT NULL OR period_end IS NOT NULL`).

cases.desc: (a) active Coverage with full period + payor display + type.text → one payer_plan_period row; concept_ids 0, names in *_source_value
(b) Coverage with no period → dropped (WHERE filters it out), zero rows
